newsItem.headline: Faye stars in Lorient 2-0 win; consolidates top-10 position after injury recovery

newNews.reasoning: Research confirms Faye returned to full competitive status post-injury with strong performance on Apr 19, 2026. Existing news only showed recovery progress; this represents actual match performance confirming return to regular play.

newsItem.headline: Club Brugge win 2025/26 Belgian Pro League title; Campbell celebrates third career trophy

newNews.reasoning: While existing news from May 26 mentions title win, research clarifies this is Campbell's THIRD career title (Belgian Cup 2024/25, Pro League 2025/26, Super Cup 2025/26). Distinction from existing news which did not specify three titles total.
